title: 3D Mace Wind Burst Effect
description: Accurate Mace 3D model in First & Third person while staying in 2D in the GUI + Wind Burst Effect 💨
body:
# Accurate 3D Mace + Wind Burst Effect
### 📜 Features
- 3D Model when held in first person, third person, on the ground and on the shelf
- 2D Default look when in inventory and item frame
- Low wind effect arround the core when enchanted with Wind Burst I or II
- High wind effect arround the core when enchanted with Wind Burst III
- Vanilla accurate first & third person viewmodel

### ⚠️ Compatibility
> ✅ **Vanilla 1.21.5+**

### 🗨️ Contact
> My Discord DM -> caiosm1
### 📷 Quick Previews

![Third Person - No Enchantment - 320x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7240b22d04a6810b95feb9645bd73f0911c327c.png) ![First Person - No Enchantment - 320x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52553e19b2a6b3f1f3a7357675721b2017da9156_0.webp)
